# Firewall Allowlist Configuration for GitHub Copilot Coding Agent

# This file documents the domains that should be added to the allowlist
# in the repository's Copilot coding agent settings to avoid firewall restrictions.

# Configuration Path:
# https://github.com/studiofirebase/studiofirebase/settings/copilot/coding_agent

# Required Domains for Google Fonts:
fonts.googleapis.com
# Optional (if font files are loaded directly):
# fonts.gstatic.com

# Instructions:
# 1. Go to: https://github.com/studiofirebase/studiofirebase/settings/copilot/coding_agent
# 2. Navigate to the "Firewall" or "Allowlist" section
# 3. Add the domains listed above to the custom allowlist
# 4. Save the changes

# Alternatively, use the setup.sh script which pre-fetches these resources
# before the firewall is enabled, eliminating the need for allowlist entries.
